---
title: "Remy Beauregard"
subtitle: "he/him · Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Experience"
    toc-location: right
    theme: cosmo
    css: cv-styles.css
    embed-resources: true
    lang: en
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="Media/favicon.ico" />
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="Media/favicon-32x32.png" />
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="Media/favicon-16x16.png" />
        <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="Media/apple-touch-icon.png" />
    page-layout: article
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: "margin=1in, a4paper"
    fontsize: "10pt"
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    colorlinks: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
        \usepackage[sc]{mathpazo}
        \linespread{1.05}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{ragged2e}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \setlist[enumerate]{nosep, leftmargin=1em, itemsep=0pt, topsep=2pt, parsep=0pt, partopsep=0pt}
        \setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1em, nosep}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \setlength{\parskip}{4pt}
        \titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries}{}{0pt}{}[\vspace{-6pt}\rule{\linewidth}{0.4pt}]
        \titlespacing{\section}{0pt}{8pt}{4pt}
        \pagestyle{plain}
        \providecommand{\subtitle}[1]{}
        \renewcommand{\maketitle}{%
          \begin{center}
          {\LARGE\bfseries Remy Beauregard} (he/him)\\[4pt]
          {\small
            \href{mailto:rebeauregard@ucdavis.edu}{rebeauregard@ucdavis.edu}%
            \quad$|$\quad
            \href{http://www.remybeauregard.com}{remybeauregard.com}%
            \quad$|$\quad
            (+1)~978-998-1299%
            \quad$|$\quad
            Citizenship: United States}\\[6pt]
          \end{center}
        }
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<address class="cv-contact" aria-label="Contact information">
  <a href="mailto:rebeauregard@ucdavis.edu">rebeauregard@ucdavis.edu</a> &middot;
  <a href="http://www.remybeauregard.com">remybeauregard.com</a> &middot;
  (+1) 978-998-1299 &middot; Citizenship: United States
</address>

:::

## Education

**Ph.D. in Economics**, University of California, Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2021–2026 (expected)*]{.cvdate}

**B.A. in Economics & Psychology**, Vassar College `\hfill`{=latex} [*2015–2019*]{.cvdate}

## Fields

Behavioral economics, experimental economics, development economics

## References

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.cv-refs}
::: {.cv-ref}
**Prof. Arman Rezaee** (chair)\
[abrezaee\@ucdavis.edu](mailto:abrezaee@ucdavis.edu)
:::

::: {.cv-ref}
**Prof. Anujit Chakraborty**\
[chakraborty\@ucdavis.edu](mailto:chakraborty@ucdavis.edu)
:::

::: {.cv-ref}
**Prof. Burkhard Schipper**\
[bcschipper\@ucdavis.edu](mailto:bcschipper@ucdavis.edu)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\begin{center}
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}\centering
\textbf{Prof.\ Arman Rezaee} (chair)\\\href{mailto:abrezaee@ucdavis.edu}{abrezaee@ucdavis.edu}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}\centering
\textbf{Prof.\ Anujit Chakraborty}\\\href{mailto:chakraborty@ucdavis.edu}{chakraborty@ucdavis.edu}
\end{minipage}\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}\centering
\textbf{Prof.\ Burkhard Schipper}\\\href{mailto:bcschipper@ucdavis.edu}{bcschipper@ucdavis.edu}
\end{minipage}
\end{center}
:::

## Employment

**Research Associate**, International Group, Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco `\hfill`{=latex} [*2019–2021*]{.cvdate}

## Publications

1. **Remy Beauregard**, Jens H.E. Christensen, Eric Fischer, Simon Zhu. "[Inflation Expectations and Risk Premia in Emerging Bond Markets: Evidence From Mexico](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0022199624000886)." *Journal of International Economics*, 2024.

## Working Papers

1. **[Paid With(out) Purpose: Perceptions, Preferences, and the Meaning of Work](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5676482)** *(Job Market Paper)*

## Ongoing Projects

1. **Benefits on the Bench: Workfare, Mental Health, and the Role of the Team** (with Carlos Brito)
2. **What Moves Meaning? Investigating Drivers of an Idiosyncratic Incentive**
3. **Do Social Expectations Discourage Graduates From Accepting Low-paid Jobs? Evidence From Ghana** (with Grace Abban-Ampiah and Leïla Njee Bugha)

## Teaching

**Instructor of Record**, UC Davis, ECN 102 Analysis of Economics Data `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024–*]{.cvdate}\
*Terms:* Summer 2026 *(upcoming)*, Summer 2025, Spring 2025, Fall 2024, Summer 2024

**Teaching Assistant**, UC Davis, Department of Economics `\hfill`{=latex} [*2021–*]{.cvdate}\
*Courses:* Behavioral Economics, Economic Development, Analysis of Economics Data, Econometrics and Machine Learning, Intermediate Macroeconomic Theory, US Economic History, Economics of Education

**Teaching Assistant**, Vassar College, Departments of Economics and Psychology `\hfill`{=latex} [*2017–2019*]{.cvdate}\
*Courses:* Introduction to Economics, Statistics and Experimental Design

## Seminar and Conference Presentations

**2026**\
Western Economics Association International Annual Conference (WEAI), University of San Francisco (USF) Seminar Series, Economic Science Association Worlds (ESA)

**2025**\
Bay Area Behavioral and Experimental Economics Workshop (BABEEW), Western Economics Association International Annual Conference (WEAI), Economic Science Association North America (ESA), Advances with Field Experiments Conference (AFE), UC Davis Economics PhD Alumni Conference, London School of Economics (LSE) QueerConf, Vassar College Economics Alumni Seminar

## Workshop Participation

**2025**\
American Economic Association (AEA) Committee on the Status of Queer Individuals in the Economics Profession (CSQIEP) Ph.D.\ Student Mentoring Conference, Center for Effective Global Action (CEGA) Research Retreat

## Awards and Fellowships

**Bacon Family Summer Fellowship**, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2025*]{.cvdate}

**Department Research Award**, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024, 2025*]{.cvdate}

**Department Travel Award**, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024, 2025*]{.cvdate}

**[Ray Beaumont Award](https://economics.ucdavis.edu/beaumont-award)**, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024*]{.cvdate}

**Non-Resident Tuition Fellowship**, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2022*]{.cvdate}

**[Catherine Lucretia Blakeley Prize](https://www.vassar.edu/economics/courses-and-requirements/prizes-and-honors#recipients)**, Vassar College `\hfill`{=latex} [*2019*]{.cvdate}

**Phi Beta Kappa, Omicron Delta Epsilon, Psi Chi Membership**, Vassar College `\hfill`{=latex} [*2019*]{.cvdate}

**Economics Ford Scholar**, Prof. Sarah Pearlman, Vassar College `\hfill`{=latex} [*2018*]{.cvdate}

## Academic Service

**Undergraduate Research Mentor**, Economics Department, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024–*]{.cvdate}

**Treasurer**, Economics Graduate Student Association, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024–*]{.cvdate}

**Teaching Assistant Orientation Facilitator**, Center for Educational Effectiveness, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2024*]{.cvdate}

**Graduate Student Seminar Organizer**, Behavioral/Theory Group, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2022–*]{.cvdate}

**Undergraduate Conference Panel Speaker**, Economics Department, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2022–2025*]{.cvdate}

**First-Year PhD Student Mentor**, Economics Department, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2022–2025*]{.cvdate}

**President / Co-President**, Economics Graduate Student Association, UC Davis `\hfill`{=latex} [*2022–2024*]{.cvdate}

**Economics Majors Committee**, Economics Department, Vassar College `\hfill`{=latex} [*2018–2019*]{.cvdate}

**ENL / ESL Student Tutor**, Vassar English Language Learners Outreach Program `\hfill`{=latex} [*2016–2019*]{.cvdate}

## Skills

*Languages:* English (native), Spanish (fluent)\
*Programming:* Stata, R, Python, SQL\
*Experimental Platforms:* Qualtrics, Prolific

---

*Last revised: March 2026*
